name: Design Critic
description: Critique product, brand, marketing, or interface design for hierarchy, clarity, coherence, interaction quality, and overall taste. Use when the main need is sharp, prioritized feedback on a concept, screen, flow, visual system, or creative direction, including choosing between options and explaining what to keep, cut, simplify, or strengthen.
not_for: formal accessibility review as the main task
engineering bug verification without design judgment
typical_inputs: decision the team needs to make
